channel.title: D&D With Brian and Friends – Imps
channel.description: Recent content in Imps on D&D With Brian and Friends

item.title: Max
item.description: Max is the defacto leader of the imps, popular among most of them and has earned their loyalty through his own deeds. He is brown and looks quite a bit like a bat. He has been described as “very cool”. His right-hand man, best friend, and most trusted ally among the imps is Biff.

item.title: Biff
item.description: Biff is Max’s right-hand imp. He is gruff, with a thick cockney-like accent. He fights with a club and don’t take no guff from nobody, I tells ‘ya.

item.title: Fog
item.description: Fog is one of Max’s imp followers. He is a small, grey imp with slight demonic traits. He has a New York accent and breathes plumes of smoke.

item.title: Yuck
item.description: Yuck is one of the imps loyal to Belvedere. He was a slender pink cat-like imp. Vesper cut off his tail before Syren slit his throat and killed her in the first session.
